Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes the R1 Concepts website for current brake part products, promotions, pricing, and featured categories.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects the latest inventory and deals, eliminating manual content research and keeping campaigns timely.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete daily marketing email — subject line, body copy, and CTA — tailored to the scraped R1 product data.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, brand-consistent email content in seconds, replacing the need for a dedicated copywriter on daily sends.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Creates the marketing email in HubSpot and sends it to the designated R1 Concepts contact lists via the Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates the full send workflow including list targeting and scheduling, ensuring daily emails go out consistently without manual intervention.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes the Dynamic Friction Company website for current product listings, promotions, and brand messaging.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Keeps email content aligned with DFC's latest catalog and offers without requiring manual product research each day.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily DFC-branded marketing email with subject line, persuasive copy, and product-specific calls to action.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers high-quality, on-brand email content daily at zero incremental copywriting cost, maintaining consistent outreach cadence.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes and sends the generated email to DFC contact lists through HubSpot's Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures reliable daily delivery to segmented audiences, fully hands-off after content generation completes.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls new and open support tickets from HubSpot, including customer details, issue descriptions, and order history.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all incoming support requests automatically so no ticket is missed and context is immediately available for classification.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and drafts a contextual reply using product knowledge from the DFC website and ticket history.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Reduces average ticket response time dramatically by pre-drafting accurate replies, letting agents review and send rather than write from scratch.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI-generated classification tag and attaches the draft reply for agent review before sending.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all ticket data and draft responses within the existing support workflow, enabling one-click review and send for the support team.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions captured as HubSpot form entries or contact properties.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Aggregates all customer-reported product issues and return reasons from Amazon packaging inserts into a single data pipeline for analysis.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs each submission to a structured Google Sheet with columns for issue type, product, date, and customer details for team analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives operations and product teams a live, filterable dashboard of customer issues, enabling trend identification and faster quality improvements.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity events on the R1 website, such as page views, product searches, and repeat visits.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI agent on R1 Concepts properties, answering product questions and guiding purchase decisions in real time.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Expected to reduce support volume and improve conversion rates by providing instant, knowledgeable assistance to customers 24/7.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Finds verified email addresses and decision-maker contacts for each discovered business prospect.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Delivers a fully automated daily lead-gen and outreach pipeline for the sublet, replacing hours of manual prospecting and email drafting.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Provides data-driven ad optimization insights that would take an analyst hours to produce, helping reduce wasted spend and improve ROAS.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using target keywords to discover content creators, influencers, and relevant social profiles across platforms.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Pulls detailed creator profiles, follower counts, engagement metrics, content topics, and recent post data from YouTube, Instagram, and Google.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Builds rich, multi-platform creator profiles automatically, replacing hours of manual research across individual social networks.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes and synthesizes all collected creator data to rank and summarize discovered creators by relevance to the target keywords and brand fit.

Creator Qualifier.impact: Replaces subjective creator evaluation with a consistent, repeatable scoring framework that can be tuned per campaign or brand requirement.

Creator Qualifier.action: Generates a final qualified creator ranking with detailed justifications for each score and tier-based recommendations for outreach priority.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Gives marketing teams a ready-to-act ranked list with clear rationale, accelerating the path from discovery to partnership outreach.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, prompt templates, and qualified creator lists from stored documents.
Creator Outreach.impact: Eliminates hours of manual research and template preparation by centralizing all outreach intelligence in one accessible location.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator using learned sequences and contextual prompts.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces highly tailored, on-brand outreach messages at scale, dramatically increasing response rates compared to generic templates.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly to qualified creators from the designated Gmail account.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates the entire send process, enabling hundreds of personalized creator contacts per week without manual copy-pasting or scheduling.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors inbox for incoming creator replies and retrieves full conversation threads including historical influencer email exchanges.
Creator Reponse.impact: Ensures no creator response is missed and provides full negotiation context, reducing response lag from hours to minutes.

Creator Reponse.action: Loads previous influencer negotiation logs, approved rate cards, and conversation playbooks to inform the AI response strategy.

Creator Reponse.action: Drafts context-aware reply emails using learned negotiation patterns and previous influencer conversation intelligence.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles nuanced creator negotiations autonomously, freeing the team from back-and-forth while preserving a natural, human-quality tone.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends the AI-drafted negotiation response back to the creator within the existing email thread.
Creator Reponse.impact: Maintains rapid turnaround on creator communications, keeping deal momentum alive and shortening overall partnership close time.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the backorder report with live inventory data, flags dead-end parts that have no viable sourcing path, and categorizes each line item by fulfillment outlook.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Immediately highlights which backorders are resolvable and which are dead ends, enabling the team to prioritize customer communication and sourcing efforts on actionable items.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for each backorder line, tailored by status — providing ETAs for in-transit parts and proactive notifications for dead-end items.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces manual email drafting with ready-to-send customer updates, dramatically reducing response time and ensuring every backordered customer receives consistent, accurate communication.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes online catalogs from Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract two-piece rotor listings with make, model, year fitment, and specifications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Eliminates the tedious manual process of browsing three separate manufacturer websites and copying fitment data, capturing the full competitive landscape in one automated pass.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor rotor data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify overlapping coverage and market gaps where DFC has no comparable product.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly where DFC competes head-to-head and where untapped market opportunities exist, providing data-driven direction for product expansion decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated customer outreach emails to gather demand data on two-piece rotors, targeting relevant accounts to validate market interest before stocking decisions.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects real customer demand signals without requiring sales reps to manually reach out, ensuring inventory decisions are backed by actual buyer interest rather than assumptions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped data, DFC cross-references, and customer demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet for Dino's review.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a comprehensive, decision-ready document that combines competitor intelligence, internal coverage analysis, and customer demand in one place — ready for product planning meetings.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad copy across Meta and TikTok campaigns, extracting every text field including headlines, descriptions, and call-to-action copy.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides instant visibility across all running ad content without requiring manual review of each campaign, ensuring no ad copy escapes compliance or brand checks.

Meta Investigation.action: Analyzes extracted ad copy against specified search phrases, identifies exact matches, and compiles a flagged list noting the precise field and full copy where each match appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches problematic or non-compliant phrases across hundreds of ads in seconds, replacing what would be hours of manual copy review and dramatically reducing the risk of policy violations going unnoticed.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted email report listing every flagged ad with the matched phrase, the specific field it was found in, and the surrounding copy for context.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an actionable audit report directly to the requester's inbox, enabling immediate remediation of flagged ads without needing to log into ad platforms or parse raw data.

summary: Here's this week's update on our AI automation pipeline. We're tracking **53 total agents** — **24 completed**, **9 in progress**, and **20 planned**. This week we added four new agents to the pipeline: the **Cerritos Building Sublet Agent**, which runs daily lead-gen for the Midway Place sublet; **R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI** for optimizing Amazon ad campaigns across both brands; **R1 Video Clipper**; and **Paid Channel Chat Bot**. On the progress front, **Agent Tracker Agent V2** moved to Completed, giving us a polished new version of our weekly pipeline formatting tool. Steady momentum across the board — more updates coming next week!
